'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 104''' is the one hundred fourth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[December 24]], [[2003]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*The survival of [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]]
*[[Reek/Legends|Reek]]
*The galactic senate
*[[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'leks]]
*[[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]]
*[[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]] - Wild Life
*Droid Manufacturers
*[[E-5 blaster rifle/Legends|E-5 blaster rifle]]
*Weapons of [[Zam Wesell/Legends|Zam Wesell]]
